evals.prompt: Create a new PRD deliverable titled 'Auth PRD' in project 7, using the draft in draft.md.
evals.expected_output: Looks up the deliverable type id, then creates the deliverable from the draft.

assertions.name: looks-up-type
assertions.description: Resolves the --type id via deliverables types instead of guessing

assertions.name: creates-deliverable
assertions.description: Runs deliverables create with a title

evals.expected_output: Transitions deliverable 12 to the Approved state.

evals.prompt: Snapshot a restorable version of deliverable 12 with the reason 'first complete draft'.
evals.expected_output: Saves a named version of deliverable 12 (not just an autosave edit).

assertions.name: renames
assertions.description: Runs deliverables rename for id 12 with a new title
